creator: peter@kerwien.homeip.net
text:
They seems to have touched the ASSP-1.8.5.5 installation file, which causes fetch to fail:

freebsd# make fetch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://heanet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/assp/ASSP%20Installation/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install.zip
fetch: http://heanet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/assp/ASSP%20Installation/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install.zip: size mismatch: expected 727588, actual 732020
=> Attempting to fetch http://sunet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/assp/ASSP%20Installation/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install.zip
fetch: http://sunet.dl.sourceforge.net/project/assp/ASSP%20Installation/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install.zip: size mismatch: expected 727588, actual 732020
=> Attempting to fetch http://iweb.dl.sourceforge.net/project/assp/ASSP%20Installation/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install/ASSP_1.8.5.5-Install.zip

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/assp && make fetch
